business_description.nature_of_business: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL, general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors

coverages_discussed.notes: Supplemental application focuses on trucking/fleet operations, CSA/DOT compliance, and transportation-related risk management. Prior insurance history shows no cancellations.

positives: No active lawsuits, liens, or judgments indicated
No DOT violations or out-of-service orders reported in the past 3 years
Fleet reported compliant with FMCSA Hours-of-Service regulations
GPS tracking or ELD devices installed in all vehicles
Annual MVR checks performed on all drivers
Valid DOT number and MC authority maintained
CDL licenses verified for all drivers at time of hire
concerns: CSA BASIC crash indicator is above intervention threshold and is currently being addressed
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Prior insurance history lists Hanover Insurance Group (2024), Hartford Financial Services (2023), and Auto-Owners Insurance (2022). Claims counts shown are 10, 13, and 12 respectively, with no cancellations.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL, general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors. Years in business: 38. Number of employees full-time: 485. Annual revenue / gross receipts: $78,000,000. Hours of operation: Mon-Fri 6:00 AM - 4:30 PM.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program: Yes. GPS tracking or ELD devices installed in all vehicles: Yes. MVR checks performed on all drivers at least annually: Yes. Fleet is compliant with FMCSA Hours-of-Service (HOS) regulations: Yes. Valid DOT number and MC authority maintained: Yes. CDL licenses verified for all drivers at time of hire: Yes.
